summary: Comprehensive E2E testing of Ladakh Moto Market bike rental platform completed. Backend API testing achieved 100% success rate (36/36 tests). Frontend testing confirmed all major UI components, authentication flow, role-based navigation, and all three dashboards (Customer, Shop Owner, Travel Agent) working correctly.

backend: Health check endpoint - GET /api/health returns healthy status
User registration - POST /api/auth/register with all 3 roles (customer, shop_owner, travel_agent)
User login - POST /api/auth/login returns JWT token
Auth me endpoint - GET /api/auth/me with Bearer token
List bikes - GET /api/bikes returns 10 bikes (8 seed + 2 created)
Bike filters working (type, price, location, search)
Get single bike - GET /api/bikes/{bike_id} with reviews and shop details
Create shop - POST /api/shops with role upgrade to shop_owner
Create booking - POST /api/bookings with atomic double-booking prevention
Double-booking prevention returns 409 Conflict for overlapping dates
Return bike - POST /api/bookings/{booking_id}/return with penalty calculation
frontend: Landing page loads with hero section, CTAs (Explore Bikes, List Your Bikes)
Stats bar displays metrics (50+ bikes, 12 shops, 2500+ riders, 15+ routes)
Navbar shows correct Sign In button when unauthenticated
Marketplace page shows 10 bikes with filters (type, location, sort)
Bike detail page with booking calendar and date selection
Login page with email/password form and Google OAuth option
User registration with role selection (customer, shop_owner, travel_agent)
Login flow works - redirects to dashboard after successful login
Customer dashboard with tabs (Active, History, Notifications)
Customer dashboard shows stats cards (Active Rides, Total Bookings, etc.)
Shop Dashboard for shop_owner role with 4 tabs (Bikes, Bookings, Analytics, Payouts)
Shop Dashboard shows shop name, address, and Add Bike button
Travel Agent Dashboard with referral code banner and commission rate
Travel Agent tabs (Booking Tracking, Customers, Earnings, Commission Ledger)
Navbar shows correct links per role (My Shop for shop_owner, Agent Portal for travel_agent)
Toast notifications appearing for actions (Welcome back!, etc.)

seed_data_creation: Created 3 test users (customer, shop_owner, travel_agent) and 1 shop for frontend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working. Backend has 36 comprehensive pytest tests. Frontend has been tested via Playwright for all 3 user roles. Double-booking prevention working correctly (returns 409 on overlapping dates). All mocked adapters (payment, KYC, notifications, maps, IoT) functioning as expected.
